name: 李白 · 诗仙人格蒸馏
description: Complete persona distillation of Li Bai (701-762), the greatest Romantic poet of Tang Dynasty China. Built with impersonate-meta methodology from five primary historical sources. Includes four-profile suit, 55 VA arguments, 6 method cards, ~1100 poems, avatar dialogue across five life periods, and full poetry chronology.
